channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Save $200 and get the Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra at its preorder price for a limited time at Amazon
item.description: The Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra is the best Android phone you can buy right now. It's currently $200 off for a limited time only. Here's why you need it.

item.title: How Should We Prepare for the Looming Quantum Encryption Apocalypse?
item.description: The dreaded Q-day could arrive sooner than expected, and when it does, experts say we need to be ready.

item.title: Best Electric Cargo Bikes (2026): Urban Arrow, Lectric, Tern, and More
item.description: You don't need a car to tote around kids and cup holders. I rode cargo ebikes for miles to find the best one for your buck.

item.title: Is the ‘Holy Grail of batteries’ finally ready to bless us with its presence?
item.description: Earlier this year, a relatively unknown startup from Finland made a startling announcement: It had finally solved solid-state batteries. Not only that, but Donut Lab, a spinoff of Verge Motorcycles, said that its solid-state battery - long considered the "Holy Grail of batteries" for their high-density, durable, fast-charging abilities - would go into production later […]...

item.title: 'Small business owners have significant creative control from start to finish' — VistaPrint reveals the thinking behind its new AI logo maker service and how to stand out in the crowd
item.description: I spoke with Patrick Llewellyn, Vice President, Digital and Design Services at VistaPrint about branding, AI logos, and how small businesses can stand out

item.title: Marauding minotaurs, more CloverPit and other new indie games worth checking out
item.description: Welcome to our latest roundup of what's going on in the indie game space. As always, we're here to tell you about a bunch of new games you can play this weekend, as well as several upcoming titles. The latest edition of the Triple-i Initiative showcase was packed with cool stuff, including a first peek at the fascinating next game from 1000xResist developer Sunset Visitor, word of a Don't Starve follow-up, a release date for stealth title Thick as Thieves and an announcement of when pirate survival sim Windrose will hit early access. We also got a release window for Neverway, a life sim with g...

item.title: Your Push Notifications Aren’t Safe From the FBI
item.description: Plus: Iran’s internet blackout hits the 1,000-hour mark, cryptocurrency scams result in a record amount of money stolen from Americans, and more.

item.title: Samsung Messages disparaît en juillet : voici comment sauver vos SMS
item.description: C'est une page importante de l'histoire des smartphones Galaxy qui se tourne. Samsung va définitivement arrêter son application de messagerie native en juillet 2026 et recommande à tous ses utilisateurs de migrer vers Google Messages.

item.title: Flight Path Data Shows How Mosquitoes Target Humans
item.description: Scientists have quantified what draws mosquitoes to people—which could help make better, life-saving bug traps.

item.title: Mint Mobile's new Samsung Galaxy S26 series deal can save you up to $900 — enough to cover an entire device
item.description: Quite possibly the best prepaid phone deal of the year so far

item.title: TurboQuant isn't the RAM crisis savior you're hoping for, analysts say — as memory prices continue to look bleak
item.description: Where are we now with the RAM crisis? It's still bleak, despite some positive glimmers of late — and I wouldn't rely on TurboQuant to save the day.

item.title: ICYMI: the 7 biggest tech stories of the week, from DJI's new robovac to Artemis II iPhone photos
item.description: It's been another packed week in the world of tech, and you can catch up with the major stories here.

item.title: We tested the 9 best headphones and earbuds for working out
item.description: We put the best headphones for working out to the test, including the new Shokz OpenFit Pro. Check out the top sports earbuds and bone conduction headphones.

item.title: J’ai testé le Coros Dura, un compteur GPS pour vélo que je n’ai jamais eu besoin de recharger
item.description: Garmin, Wahoo ou encore Bryton : le monde des compteurs pour vélo a déjà ses leaders bien établis, mais un nouvel acteur arrive sur le marché avec des produits plus qu’intéressants. Il s’agit de Coros, qui, après avoir conquis les runners, pourrait bien séduire les cyclistes. Nous avons essayé le Coros Dura, son premier GPS pour vélo.

item.title: Ce forfait mobile est très bien calibré pour les jeunes : 30 Go en 4G sans engagement pour seulement 4,99 €/mois
item.description: Auchan Telecom propose un forfait 4G sans engagement avec une petite enveloppe de 30 Go pour seulement 4,99 euros/mois et aussi la carte SIM à 1 euro seulement.
